title: EDM v0.6.0 to v0.7.0 Migration Crosswalk
description: Documents changes from EDM v0.6.0 to v0.7.0 including arc_type field, extensions domain, enum expansions, field removals, and free-text enum pattern.

fields_added.description: Structural emotional arc pattern encoded at capture time. Canonical values: betrayal, liberation, grief, discovery, resistance, bond, moral_awakening, transformation, reconciliation, reckoning, threshold, exile. Free text accepted for novel arc types.
fields_added.migration_action: ADD - optional field, absence is valid

fields_added.description: Partner-namespaced semantic enrichments. Each key is a partner or platform identifier. Values are partner-defined objects. Extensions containing semantic enrichment are included in the seal hash when present at seal time.
fields_added.migration_action: ADD - optional domain, absence is valid

fields_added.description: Timestamp of the original source content, distinct from created_at which marks extraction time. Enables accurate temporal graph traversal.
fields_added.migration_action: ADD - optional field, absence is valid

fields_removed.reason: Signal captured by transformational_pivot + strength_score + recurrence_pattern. Field was redundant.
fields_removed.migration_action: DROP - no replacement needed, signal preserved in other fields

fields_removed.reason: Platform feedback signal, not an artifact field. Moved to platform layer.
fields_removed.migration_action: DROP - field moved to platform infrastructure

fields_removed.reason: Platform-managed, always zero at extraction time, excluded from seal hash. Kept waypoint_ids only.
fields_removed.migration_action: DROP - platform-managed field removed from spec

fields_removed.reason: Redundant with memory_type in constellation domain.
Vendor pipeline concern, not representational. Belongs in Extensions or vendor infrastructure.
fields_removed.migration_action: DROP - move to extensions domain if needed

enum_expansions.rationale: SDK evaluation: disappointment captures unmet expectation distinct from sadness, relief captures tension release distinct from peace, frustration captures blocked goal distinct from anger.
SDK evaluation: loss captures decline without recovery arc, confrontation captures direct conflict engagement.

enum_pattern.description: All enum fields now accept free text via z.union([z.enum([...]), z.string()]) pattern
enum_pattern.rationale: Canonical values preferred for cross-artifact comparability, but accuracy takes precedence over canonical conformance. SDK enforces preferred values via Zod union pattern.

system_embeddings.change: Clarified as platform-managed, not populated at extraction time, excluded from seal hash

crosswalk_fields.change: Clarified as optional professional mapping hooks, null valid in all profiles

schema_hosting.description: v0.7.0 schemas hosted at canonical URLs

backward_compatibility.v06_to_v07: v0.6.0 artifacts remain valid under v0.7.0. Fields removed in v0.7.0 are ignored by v0.7.0 validators. New fields are optional.
backward_compatibility.v07_to_v06: v0.7.0 artifacts using new fields (arc_type, extensions, source_timestamp) or new enum values will fail v0.6.0 strict validation.

forward_compatibility.existing_artifacts: No migration required for existing v0.6.0 artifacts
forward_compatibility.new_extractions: New extractions may use arc_type, extensions, source_timestamp, and expanded enum values
forward_compatibility.validation: v0.7.0 validators accept all v0.6.0 values plus new fields and enum values

steps: 2. Remove deprecated fields if present (legacy_embed, alignment_delta, sector_weights, HMD_v2_memory_type, extraction_chunking_strategy)
3. Optionally add arc_type if extractable from source content
4. Optionally add extensions domain for partner-specific data
5. Optionally add meta.source_timestamp if original content timestamp known
6. Update schema $ref URLs to v0.7.0 canonical URLs
7. Validate against appropriate v0.7.0 profile schema

migration_script_template.description: Pseudocode for migrating v0.6.0 artifacts to v0.7.0
code: // New fields are optional - add if data available
